cnbc.title: TSA funding update: House GOP spikes DHS funding proposal, extending shutdown that's caused airport delays
cnbc.summary: President Donald Trump on Friday issued an executive order to pay Transportation Security Administration agents during the shutdown.

cnbc.title: Tech stocks suffer worst week in nearly a year, driven down by war worries, Meta legal woes
cnbc.summary: Meta's twin legal defeats this week and a big sell-off in Micron spurred a drop in technology stocks, which were broadly hit by rising oil prices.

cnbc.title: Trump calls Strait of Hormuz the 'Strait of Trump'
cnbc.summary: Trump recently floated the possibility that the strait could be controlled jointly by "me and the ayatollah" as part of a resolution to the Iran war.

cnbc.title: TSA officers will start getting paychecks as early as Monday, DHS says
cnbc.summary: The announcement comes as long lines for TSA screening of air travelers at  airports around the United States persist.

cnbc.title: Tiger Woods arrested for DUI after rollover car crash, Florida sheriff says
cnbc.summary: Golf legend Tiger Woods was arrested for a DUI after a rollover car crash in Florida on Friday, the Martin County Sheriff said.

cnbc.title: Epstein victims sue Google and the Trump administration over alleged disclosure of personal information
cnbc.summary: A lawsuit filed in Northern California alleges that Google's AI features generated contact information for Epstein victims.

cnbc.title: White House launches app touting Trump's record, with some key omissions
cnbc.summary: The app includes a link to report tips to Immigration and Customs Enforcement.

cnbc.title: Cybersecurity stocks fall on report Anthropic is testing a powerful new model
cnbc.summary: The cybersecurity sector has slumped this year on fears that new AI will massively disrupt their business models.

cnbc.title: Elon Musk's Boring Co. tunnels aren't wanted by most Nashville residents
cnbc.summary: A new survey by Vanderbilt University found that most Nashville residents don't want Boring Company tunnels in their city.

cnbc.title: Infiniti hopes new SUV can turn around fortunes in the U.S.
cnbc.summary: Infiniti is releasing a new midsize SUV, the QX65, in an effort to turn around sales in the U.S. market.
